root.rep_text: กระดาษทำการสินทรัพย์ถาวรและค่าเสื่อมราคา ตามวันที่คำนวณ

cal_expire_date.text: วันที่ประมวล

root.sql: SELECT sc_acc_m_expire.description, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.meterial_id, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.seq_no, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.amount, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.total_amount, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.present_value, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.cal_expire_date, sc_acc_m_expire.rate_expire, sc_acc_m_expire.amount_value, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.operate_date, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.item_type, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.day_cal, sc_acc_m_expire.first_used_day, sc_acc_m_expire.balance, sc_acc_m_ucf_group_exp.group_name, sc_acc_m_expire.group_exp, sc_acc_m_expire.cut_paid_status, sc_acc_m_expire.accu_expire_amount, sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.begin_exp, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.buy_in_year, (case when sc_acc_m_expire_detail.remark is null then 'ซื้อวันที่ ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_acc_m_expire.first_used_day , 'dd/mm/yyyy') else sc_acc_m_expire_detail.remark end) as remark , sc_acc_m_expire_detail.bf_value FROM sc_acc_m_expire, sc_acc_m_expire_detail, sc_acc_m_ucf_group_exp WHERE ( sc_acc_m_expire_detail.meterial_id = sc_acc_m_expire.material_id ) and ( sc_acc_m_expire.group_exp = sc_acc_m_ucf_group_exp.group_exp ) and sc_acc_m_ucf_group_exp.group_exp != '300' /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_acc_m_expire_detail.cal_expire_date = '31/12/2019' order by sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old
